specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. Whether you're docked in the Chesapeake Bay, cruising the Atlantic coast, or keeping your boat in South Florida waters, we bring the expertise and hands-on care your boat deserves. We serve a wide service area — up to 60 miles — so quality marine work is never far away.

At Ben's Boatworks, we handle the full spectrum of marine services. Our boat surveying and inspection work gives buyers, sellers, and owners a clear picture of a vessel's true condition. We also provide diving and underwater services for hull inspections, prop work, and anything that keeps you from having to haul out unnecessarily. Our marine AC and climate control services keep your cabin comfortable in the heat, and our marine plumbing and sanitation work ensures your onboard systems are clean, functional, and up to code.

We understand that your boat represents a significant investment — financially and personally. That's why every job we take on gets our full attention, whether it's a pre-purchase survey in Annapolis or an underwater inspection off the South Florida coast. We work with boat owners, buyers, and lenders who need honest assessments and reliable service they can count on. At Ben's Boatworks, we're here to make sure your time on the water is spent enjoying it, not worrying about what's going wrong below the waterline.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing in South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough boat surveys and inspections to assess the structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition of a vessel. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition-and-value report, we provide detailed, honest documentation that protects your investment and satisfies lender or underwriter requirements.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services eliminate the need for costly haulouts by handling hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and underwater debris removal in the water. We assess and address below-the-waterline issues quickly, keeping your vessel operational and reducing downtime between trips.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in warm-weather conditions. We work with chilled-water and self-contained marine HVAC systems, diagnosing refrigerant issues, seacock problems, and compressor failures to restore reliable cooling aboard your vessel.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle all aspects of marine plumbing and sanitation, including holding tank installation, through-hull fitting repair, raw water systems, and marine head service. Properly maintained onboard plumbing and sanitation systems are essential for safety, compliance, and the comfort of everyone aboard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition report for prospective buyers
Underwater hull inspection and zinc anode replacement without haulout
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis and refrigerant recharge
Holding tank installation and marine sanitation system overhaul
Insurance survey and vessel valuation for underwriting purposes
Propeller inspection and debris removal via professional dive service
Marine raw water plumbing repair and through-hull fitting replacement
